summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FASE 0: Multi-Entity Foundation + Notification Center + Master Field Enhancements. All backend APIs (39/39 tests) and frontend features working correctly. Entity scoping verified (scoped: orders/customers, shared: products/warehouses/stock). New fields persisted correctly. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Backend: All 4 roles login successfully (admin, sales, manager, warehouse)
Backend: GET /api/entities returns 2 seeded entities (PT Kain Suka Cita, CV Kanda Suka)
Backend: POST /api/entities (admin) creates new entity successfully
Backend: POST /api/entities (sales) returns 403 (permission denied) - correct
Backend: POST /api/entities with duplicate short_name returns 409 - correct
Backend: PATCH /api/entities/{id} updates entity successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/entities/{id} soft deletes (status=inactive) - correct
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns array of notifications
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns {count: 1}
Backend: POST /api/notifications/{id}/read marks notification read
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications read
Backend: POST /api/notifications/generate (admin) creates 1 notification
Backend: POST /api/notifications/generate (2nd call) returns 0 - idempotent (dedupe working)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/generate (manager) works correctly
Backend: POST /api/notifications/generate (sales) returns 403 - correct
Backend: GET /api/dashboard (all entities) returns active_orders=8, customers=5
Backend: GET /api/dashboard?entity_id=ent_kanda returns active_orders=2, customers=2 (SCOPED)
Backend: Dashboard shared resources verified: products=7, warehouses=3, available_qty=3055, reserved_qty=220 (SAME across entities)
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders returns 8 orders total
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders?entity_id=ent_ksc returns 6 orders
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders?entity_id=ent_kanda returns 2 orders
Backend: Entity scoping verified: KSC (6) + Kanda (2) = 8 total
Backend: GET /api/customers returns 5 customers total
Backend: GET /api/customers?entity_id=ent_kanda returns 2 customers (filtered)
Backend: POST /api/customers with new fields (npwp, credit_limit, sales_pic, entity_id) persists correctly
Backend: POST /api/products with new fields (harga_pokok, gramasi) persists correctly
Backend: PATCH /api/products/{id} updates harga_pokok and gramasi successfully
Backend: Regression - All existing endpoints work: dashboard, products, customers, warehouses, sales-orders, invoices, purchase-orders
Frontend: Login as admin successful via quick button
Frontend: Entity Switcher found in TopBar with label 'Semua Entitas'
Frontend: Notification Bell found in TopBar
Frontend: Notification Badge shows 1 unread notification
Frontend: Entity Switcher menu opens and shows 3 options (Semua Entitas, PT Kain Suka Cita, CV Kanda Suka)
Frontend: Selecting CV Kanda Suka updates Entity Switcher label to 'Kanda'
Frontend: Dashboard KPI changes after entity selection (active_orders: 8 → 2)
Frontend: Notification panel opens when bell clicked
Frontend: Mark All Read button works
Frontend: Generate (Scan) button works for admin
Frontend: Admin Entities tab is FIRST tab in admin workspace
Frontend: Entity records listed (3 entities including newly created test entity)
Frontend: Entity create form has all required fields (legal_name, short_name, npwp, address, city, doc_prefix, type, tax_mode)
Frontend: Product tab create form has new fields: harga_pokok, gramasi
Frontend: Customer tab create form has new fields: npwp, credit_limit, sales_pic
Frontend: Sales role login works (redirects to Sales POS workspace)
Frontend: Entity Switcher and Notification Bell visible for sales role
Frontend: No red-screen errors for any role
